result.stdout:
Description:
  PostgreSQL Table Partitioning Tool

Usage:
  InitializeNL.PgPartitionSmith.Cli [options]

Options:
  --connection-string <connection-string> (REQUIRED)  PostgreSQL connection string
  --table-name <table-name> (REQUIRED)                Name of the table to partition
  --query <query> (REQUIRED)                          SQL query that returns a JSON partition schema
  --schema <schema>                                   PostgreSQL schema name [default: public]
  --dry-run                                           Print SQL statements without executing them [default: False]
  --partitioned-name <partitioned-name>               Name suffix for the partitioned table [default: part]
  --unpartitioned-name <unpartitioned-name>           Name suffix for the unpartitioned table [default: unpart]
  --hashed-names                                      Use short hashed names for partition tables with COMMENT ON TABLE for context [default: False]
  --version                                           Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                      Show help and usage information
